meaning: n.五金器具,(电脑的)硬件,(电子仪器的)部件
examples: The components are readily available in hardware stores.
Hardware shops have sold out of water pumps and tarpaulins.
To be totally secure, you need a piece of hardware that costs about $200.
If only it ran full Windows 8 -- it might have won based on hardware alone.
Other hardware mentions include 1GB of RAM, 8-megapixel camera, 16GB of storage plus microSD capability.
